airnow 0.1.0.9000

airnow: Retrieve 'AirNow' Air Quality Observations and Forecasts

Source: R/airnow-package.R
airnow-package.Rd

Retrieve air quality data via the 'AirNow' https://www.airnow.gov/ API.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://briandconnelly.github.io/airnow/
